features.title: 项目初始化
features.description: 初始化 React + TypeScript + Tailwind + Vite 项目。
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Installed dependencies with `cd frontend && npm install` in the module directory after sandbox network restrictions required escalation. Verified with `cd frontend && npm run build`; TypeScript and Vite production build passed, producing `dist/index.html`, CSS, and JS assets. Fixed `tsconfig.json` so `tsc -b` checks the existing app config instead of a missing `vite.config.ts` input.

features.title: 聊天页面 UI
features.description: 实现聊天主页面与基础布局。
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Chat page, message list, textarea input, send button, loading state, conversation ID display, and file-upload placeholder are implemented. Verified by `npm run build` and by starting Vite with `VITE_USE_MOCK=false VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000 npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173`; `curl -sS -m 8 http://127.0.0.1:5173` returned the Vite HTML shell.

features.title: 接入聊天 API
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Updated `src/services/api.ts` to send the documented JSON body to Chatbot and map Chatbot's sentiment object plus source snippets into the frontend message shape. Verified mock-first E2E with `python scripts/verify_mock_first_e2e.py` while Chatbot and Vite dev servers were running; `/api/chat` returned reply, conversation_id, entities, and sources. 2026-04-29: Browser walkthrough against the full no-mock backend passed. Sending `Use recent crypto reports to explain the Bitcoin market outlook.` from the Chat page produced a real reply, `Sentiment: Neutral`, a non-empty conversation id, and visible `Sources` with titles and snippets.
verification: 返回 reply 正常显示
API 失败时有错误提示

features.title: 文件上传组件
features.description: 实现文件上传组件 UI。
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: File upload placeholder component exists and is wired into the chat form. Because Chatbot's current `/api/chat` contract is JSON-only, the frontend keeps upload as UI state and sends the documented JSON payload for API calls. Verified by `npm run build`.

features.title: Dashboard 页面
features.description: 实现趋势与情绪分布可视化页面。
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Updated Dashboard API adapter to call `/api/sentiment/summary?crypto=BTC&period=<range>` and map Chatbot's `{crypto, period, overall_sentiment, trend, top_topics, data_points_analyzed}` response into the UI's `DashboardSummary` shape. Verified by `npm run build` and mock-first E2E; `/api/sentiment/summary?crypto=BTC&period=7d` returned HTTP 200 with seven trend points. 2026-04-29: Browser walkthrough against the full no-mock backend passed. Dashboard loaded without errors or undefined text, showed sentiment charts, and the `90 Days` filter refreshed the page to `当前时间筛选器为 90d` with real API data.

features.title: 状态检测与错误处理
features.description: 处理系统状态与异常提示。
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Updated health adapter to map Chatbot's `modules` health response into frontend `HealthStatus` and avoid undefined UI text. Verified by `npm run build` and mock-first E2E; `/api/health` returned HTTP 200 with lora, rag, and ner module statuses. 2026-04-29: Browser walkthrough showed `API Status` as `ok · lora: ok, rag: ok, ner: ok` while connected to the full no-mock Chatbot service. 2026-05-02: Settings now displays the current Vite runtime env instead of hard-coded mock values, and Dashboard shows `Frontend Mode` so mock and real-api states are visible. Mock mode reports frontend mock health instead of real provider module ok text. Verified by `cd frontend && npm run build`; a temporary Vite run with `VITE_USE_MOCK=false VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000` served transformed modules containing `VITE_USE_MOCK: "false"` and `VITE_API_BASE_URL: "http://127.0.0.1:8000"`.
